title: Öğrenci Dekanlığı (Sağlık, Kültür ve Spor Müdürlüğü)

Öğrenci Toplulukları

MENU

Mission:

Our mission is to unite automotive/mechanical engineeering studetns within uinversity’s community to explore, appreciate and learn about the automotive world. We are dedicated to providğin a platform for students to share their passion for automotive engineering, design and cultre. Through hands on projects such as acreating a Formula student team, knowledge-sharing sessions and collabrative events. We aim to improve our members’ automotive skilss and knowledge.

Vision:

Driving shared passion for cars and innnovatio, at İstanbul Okan University, our vision is to create close community of automotive passionate students who learn, collaborate and celebrate the world of vehicles. Our goal is to be a hub for all things related to automotive/mechanical engineering and promoting a love for cars.
